hero.title: Virtual Try-on
hero.description: Transform your shopping experience with AI-powered virtual try-on technology. See how clothes look in seconds without changing rooms. Perfect for fashion retailers and online shoppers who want to reduce returns and increase confidence in online purchases.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload your photo and clothing item

steps.title: Upload your photo and clothing
steps.description: Take a clear photo or upload an existing one, then select the clothing item you want to try. Our AI analyzes both to create realistic virtual fitting.

steps.title: AI analyzes and matches
steps.description: Advanced algorithms analyze your body measurements, pose, and the clothing's specifications to ensure accurate size and fit recommendations.

steps.title: See instant results
steps.description: View how the clothing looks on your body type from multiple angles. Zoom in to check fabric details and fit accuracy.

steps.title: Make confident purchases
steps.description: Save your favorites, compare different styles, and buy with confidence knowing exactly how each item will look and fit.

items.question: What is the Virtual Try-on workflow?
items.answer: Virtual Try-on is an AI-powered workflow that creates realistic virtual fitting room experiences. Upload your photo and clothing to see how items look on you instantly.

items.question: How accurate is the virtual try-on technology?
items.answer: Our AI uses advanced body analysis and fabric simulation to achieve high accuracy. Results show realistic draping, fit, and movement based on your actual measurements.

items.question: What types of clothing work best?
items.answer: The system works excellently with tops, dresses, pants, jackets, and most fashion items. Some very complex or highly structured garments may have limitations.

items.question: Do I need special photos?
items.answer: A clear, full-body photo in fitted clothing works best. Good lighting and simple poses help the AI analyze your proportions accurately.

items.question: Can I try on multiple items?
items.answer: Yes. You can build complete outfits, mix and match different pieces, and save your favorite combinations for future reference.

items.question: How does this help reduce returns?
items.answer: By showing exactly how clothes will fit your body type before purchase, virtual try-on eliminates sizing guesswork and dramatically reduces return rates.

items.question: Is my photo data secure?
items.answer: Your photos are processed securely and used only for generating your virtual try-on results. We follow strict privacy and data protection standards.

items.question: Can retailers integrate this into their stores?
items.answer: Yes. We offer easy integration options for e-commerce platforms, allowing retailers to add virtual try-on capabilities to their existing stores.
